title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sanofi India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Sanofi India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Sanofi India has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Ahmedabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sanofi India:
Sanofi India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sanofi India!
